title: Playing Prague
description:
Playing Prague is a relaxing puzzle game in which Prague comes to life at your fingertips.Discover this bohemian city with playing cards featuring the ancient symbols of Prague houses. Match the right cards and each level will reveal new iconic landmarks such as the Charles Bridge, the Prague Astronomical Clock, Prague Castle or the Petřín Tower. Along the way, you will meet Kafka, Einstein, Mozart and other personalities whose fate is linked to Prague.

Every detail of the game is a tribute to the 1000-year cultural heritage of a city that was once the seat of the Holy Roman Emperors and the capital of the Bohemian Kingdom. It is also the origin of the designation of bohemians as people with a creative and unconventional way of life. 

Playing Prague offers:• A combination of city building and logical pattern composition

• Six hand-crafted levels with iconic Prague landmarks and ten more available to purchase

• Collector’s set of monuments and historical personalities

• A challenge for experienced puzzle fans and casual players alike

The free base game contains one level pack including 6 levels. Two additional packs (5+5 levels) are available to purchase. Support the development of the game and get new puzzles and additional historical content! 

This game is a celebration of Prague and all those who have shaped and continue to shape this beautiful city.
description_short: Playing Prague is a relaxing puzzle game in which Prague comes to life at your fingertips. Discover this bohemian city with playing cards featuring the ancient symbols of Prague houses.
